headlines.headline: Bettors heavily invested in Knicks to win NBA Finals
headlines.description: At DraftKings Sportsbook in New York, the Knicks have attracted nearly half of all money wagered on the NBA Finals winner this season -- almost as much as every other team combined.

headlines.headline: What is the key to Knicks-Spurs in NBA Finals?
headlines.description: What is the key to Knicks-Spurs in NBA Finals?

headlines.headline: Wembanyama, Spurs win the West, topple Thunder 111-103 in Game 7 to head to NBA Finals
headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs started the Western Conference finals with a win in Oklahoma City, then ended the series the same way.

headlines.headline: Thunder say no excuses, just 'get better' as title reign ends
headlines.description: The Thunder tipped their cap to the Spurs after a disappointing Game 7 loss and set out to "try to get over the hump" against a team that looms as a long-term roadblock.

headlines.headline: Emotional Victor Wembanyama leads Spurs back to NBA Finals
headlines.description: The Spurs eliminated the defending champion Thunder in Game 7 of the Western Conference finals, a 111-103 victory fueled by center Victor Wembanyama's 22 points and seven rebounds.

headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. is so excited for Spurs-Knicks Finals rematch
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith joins "SportsCenter" to weigh in on the 1999 Finals rematch between the Spurs and Knicks.

headlines.headline: What A.J. Brown would bring to the Patriots' offense
headlines.description: An Eagles' trade with New England for the receiver has been rumored for months. Could it happen this week?

headlines.headline: Offseason changes bringing new look to 2026 Commanders
headlines.description: Here are the changes on offense and defense that Washington has made -- so far -- this offseason.

headlines.headline: Browns WR Jerry Jeudy aims to return to Pro Bowl form in 2026
headlines.description: The veteran says he's focused on limiting drops as he looks forward to a new season and consistency at QB.

headlines.headline: Garrett Wilson, Jets fully endorsing Frank Reich at OTAs
headlines.description: As New York's star receiver enters Year 5 in his fourth offense, he fully believes in the OC's vision.

headlines.headline: Sources: Vikings hire Seahawks' Nolan Teasley as GM
headlines.description: The Vikings have hired Nolan Teasley as their general manager, sources told NFL Network, concluding an unusual chapter for the franchise.

headlines.headline: 'Not an Unc yet': Why Lamar Jackson doesn't feel old
headlines.description: With a new coach and new OC, Jackson said the start of this season is a "breath of fresh air."

headlines.headline: Five reasons the Hurricanes will win the Stanley Cup
headlines.description: Here are the factors that will determine the Stanley Cup Final -- and why the Canes will come out on top.

headlines.headline: Claude Lemieux's brain being donated for CTE research, family says
headlines.description: Claude Lemieux's brain is being donated to the Boston University CTE Center to research the long-term effects of repetitive brain injuries, his family said.

headlines.headline: Former Chicago Blackhawks forward Dennis Hull dies at 81
headlines.description: Dennis Hull, the two-way NHL forward who starred alongside superstar brother Bobby Hull with the Blackhawks, helped Canada win the 1972 Summit Series over the Soviet Union and appeared in five NHL All-Star Games, has died at the age of 81.

headlines.headline: Barkov leads Finland past Canada at world championships
headlines.description: Led by Aleksander Barkov, captain and two-time Stanley Cup champ for the Florida Panthers who missed the entire NHL season with an injury, Finland upset Canada 4-2 Saturday in Zurich, setting up the ice hockey world championship final against Switzerland.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes the favorite over Golden Knights to take home the Cup
headlines.description: The Stanley Cup Final is set, with the Carolina Hurricanes entering as favorites over the Vegas Golden Knights.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes favored over Golden Knights in Stanley Cup Final
headlines.description: Having finally gotten over the conference finals hump, the Hurricanes are favored over the Golden Knights as they head into their first Stanley Cup Final since 2006.
